title: heuchera cylindrica var. glabella
intro: Heuchera cylindrica var. glabella, also known as coral bells, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifragaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Heuchera cylindrica var. glabella are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
